com.hp.workpath.api.access

Class Principal

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.access.Principal
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    public final class Principal
extends java.lang.Object
implements android.os.Parcelable, com.hp.workpath.api.Convertor

    Principal object to return authenticated user details such as user name, domain, password and others.

    Since:
    API 1

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  Principal.SimpleAuthority
      The accessible authorities

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getDomain()
      Returns authenticated user domain
      java.lang.String getFullyQualifiedName()
      Returns authenticated user full name : provider/domain/id
      java.lang.String getPassword()
      Returns authenticated user password if authentication provider requires password when sign in
      java.lang.String getPrincipalId()
      Returns authenticated user id
      java.lang.String getProvider()
      Returns authenticated user provider
      java.lang.String getProviderUUID()
      Returns authenticated agent provider uuid
      java.util.List<Principal.SimpleAuthority> getSimpleAuthorities()
      Returns lists of authorities that current authenticated user has
      java.lang.String getUserEmail()
      Returns authenticated user email
      java.lang.String getUsername()
      Returns authenticated user name (display name)
      java.lang.String getUserProperty(java.lang.String propertyName)
      Return user property
      boolean isAdmin()
      Returns result whether authenticated user has system admin privilege or not
      boolean isAuthenticated()
      Returns status whether device is authenticated or not
      boolean isAuthNAgentTrusted()
      Returns current status whether authenticated user is a whitelisted or not
      boolean isDeviceUser()
      Returns current status whether authenticated user is a device user or not
      boolean isGuestUser()
      Returns current status whether authenticated user is a guest user or not
      boolean isServiceUser()
      Returns current status whether authenticated user is a service user or not
      boolean isSmartCardUser()
      Returns current status whether authenticated user is a smartcard user or not

    • Method Detail

      • getProvider

        public java.lang.String getProvider()

        Returns authenticated user provider

        Returns:
        String authenticated user provider. If device is not authenticated, no value returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for provider is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for provider is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getDomain

        public java.lang.String getDomain()

        Returns authenticated user domain

        Returns:
        String authenticated user domain. If device is not authenticated, no value returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for domain is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for domain is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getFullyQualifiedName

        public java.lang.String getFullyQualifiedName()

        Returns authenticated user full name : provider/domain/id

        Returns:
        String authenticated user full name. If device is not authenticated, default value returns (LOCAL//guest).
        • Return can be null if the value for fullyQualifiedName is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for fullyQualifiedName is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getPrincipalId

        public java.lang.String getPrincipalId()

        Returns authenticated user id

        Returns:
        String authenticated user id. If device is not authenticated, guest userid returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for principalId is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for principalId is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getUsername

        public java.lang.String getUsername()

        Returns authenticated user name (display name)

        Returns:
        String authenticated user name. If device is not authenticated, guest username returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for username is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for username is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getPassword

        public java.lang.String getPassword()

        Returns authenticated user password if authentication provider requires password when sign in

        Returns:
        String authenticated user password. If device is not authenticated, no value returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for password is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for password is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • getUserEmail

        public java.lang.String getUserEmail()

        Returns authenticated user email

        Returns:
        String authenticated user email. If device is not authenticated, no value returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for userEmail is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for userEmail is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • isAuthenticated

        public boolean isAuthenticated()

        Returns status whether device is authenticated or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of authenticated. If device is not authenticated, returns false.
        Since:
        API 1

      • isAdmin

        public boolean isAdmin()

        Returns result whether authenticated user has system admin privilege or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user permission to access as system admin. If authenticated user doesn't have admin privilege, returns false.
        Since:
        API 1

      • getSimpleAuthorities

        public java.util.List<Principal.SimpleAuthority> getSimpleAuthorities()

        Returns lists of authorities that current authenticated user has

        Returns:
        List the list of authorities.
        Since:
        API 1

      • getUserProperty

        public java.lang.String getUserProperty(java.lang.String propertyName)

        Return user property

        Parameters:
        propertyName - the property name for retrieving value
        Returns:
        String the value of the property. If there is no property with such name, returns null.
        • Return can be null if the value for propertyName is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for propertyName is empty
        Since:
        API 1

      • isSmartCardUser

        public boolean isSmartCardUser()

        Returns current status whether authenticated user is a smartcard user or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user type. If authenticated user is not a smartcard user, returns false.
        Since:
        API 3

      • isServiceUser

        public boolean isServiceUser()

        Returns current status whether authenticated user is a service user or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user type. If authenticated user is not a service user, returns false.
        Since:
        API 3

      • isGuestUser

        public boolean isGuestUser()

        Returns current status whether authenticated user is a guest user or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user type. If authenticated user is not a guest user, returns false.
        Since:
        API 3

      • isDeviceUser

        public boolean isDeviceUser()

        Returns current status whether authenticated user is a device user or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user type. If authenticated user is not a device user, returns false.
        Since:
        API 3

      • getProviderUUID

        public java.lang.String getProviderUUID()

        Returns authenticated agent provider uuid

        Returns:
        String authenticated agent provider uuid. If device is not authenticated, no value returns.
        • Return can be null if the value for providerUUID is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for providerUUID is empty
        Since:
        API 3

      • isAuthNAgentTrusted

        public boolean isAuthNAgentTrusted()

        Returns current status whether authenticated user is a whitelisted or not

        Returns:
        boolean result of user type. If authenticated user is not a whitelisted, returns false.
        Since:
        API 4
